mnemonics: Sum and Product: Add up the stars, multiply the groups!
Permutations: The order matters, like a recipe to follow!
keyPoints: The Rule of Sum: a + b = (a + 1)(b + 1) - 1
The Rule of Product: a * b = (a + 1)(b + 1) - 1
The Binomial Theorem: (a + b)^n = ∑[n! / (k!(n - k)!)] * a^(n - k) * b^k
Combinations with Repetition: n + kr = (n + k - 1)! / (k!(n - 1)!)
